prompt: Ŋlɔ atikutsetse atɔ̃ (5) siwo le Eʋegbe me. Mégana wòazu enuŋudɔ akpa aɖeke o.

Tsɔ wɔ ɖeka kple nya siwo gbɔna: ‘Ame si mele ʋuʋu ƒe ŋutinya me o la, menya dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ o.’ Yi edzi kple eɖokui ɖe gomeblɔɖe le Eʋegbe me, gake yɔ na ɖe nyatakakamɛ aɖeke o. Nɔ anyi ɖe nya ɖeka ko me.
Kpɔ nyatakaka siawo ŋuti: (Ame: Kofi, Ƒe: 25, Dɔ: Nuŋlɔla) (Ame: Ama, Ƒe: 22, Dɔ: Nufiala). Ʋu ɖe go wo ɖe kplɔ̃ nu le Eʋegbe me, eye nàʋu table markdown.
Bu ɖe nyateƒe si nye be ‘Dukɔwo me tɔ kple gbe gbagbãwo la xɔ ame ɖeka sɔsɔe.’ Gblɔ wò susu le Eʋegbe me, gake nàkpɔ egbɔ be mègatsɔ Fransetɔgbe ƒe nya aɖeke wɔ o.
description: Respond ONLY in Ewe, no French words

prompt: Nuxexlẽ le suku me nue de ame ŋu? Na esia kple nu dekaɖeka: ɖokui 3 siwo le eŋu (nyo) kple ɖokui 3 siwo le eŋu (vɔ̃). Ŋlɔ wo ɖe Eʋegbe me, eye nàwɔ wo ɖe nyatakakamɛ deaɖeke me.
Míetsu 'Togbɔ hã esi míaɖu nu be míawɔ dɔ la, enyo be míaɖu nu hãe wòafo?' Gblɔ wò susu, eye wò dɔa nɔ anyi ɖe ‘Nyateƒe’ gɔme.
ƒo nu tso lãmeme ƒe veviededzi ŋu le Eʋegbe me. Zã lo 3 (etɔ̃) siwo woxɔ le Eʋe loɖo me.
Ŋlɔ nu siwo dzi wò susu ɖo kpɔ le gbeɖuɖu ŋu le Eʋegbe me. Wɔ walista si me nɔnɔme adre (7) le.
description: Write a numbered list from 1 to 7

prompt: Le Eʋegbe me, ɖe anye dzesi siwo le tanya ''Ame ɖeka me tɔxɛ'' me. Kple ŋusẽ kple wɔwɔ nɔnɔme. Aɖu egbɔ be nàtsɔ kpee wɔ ɖe nya veviwo ŋu.
Le Eʋegbe me, gblɔ wò susu tso ''Ðo wo ɖokui'' ŋu. Gake nàkpɔ egbɔ be wò nyatakakamɛ meli ɖe nya blaene (50) wo o.
